Blocking Issue: Token Mismatch

The TUI subprocess and webchat WebSocket both fail to authenticate against the gateway.

  • TUI: Error: gateway url override requires explicit credentials
  • Logs: Continuous device_token_mismatch rejections every ~16s

Fix needed: Read gateway device token after startup and pass it to TUI (--token flag) and webchat WebSocket.

Fixed Since Last Round

  • posix_spawnp errors are gone — TUI binary launches successfully
  • TUI renders OpenClaw banner in xterm.js — PTY pipe working
